title: LINCOLN COMMUNITY DISPUTE RESOLUTION - 211info
text: LINCOLN COMMUNITY DISPUTE RESOLUTION LINCOLN COMMUNITY DISPUTE RESOLUTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Dispute resolution and agreement development in the following areas: Housing, Workplace, Neighbors, Family Members, Youth, Businesses, and Government. Also offers Conflict Resolution training and group meeting facilitation with emphasis on consensus-building. 111 SE Douglas Street Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: By appointment only. Services are scheduled to accommodate needs of client Email (541) 574-9846 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 574-9846 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call and leave message for an appointment. Visit website for more information FEES: None; donations accepted DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lincoln County Services: Conflict Resolution Training Landlord/Tenant Dispute Resolution Mediation Victim/Offender Mediation Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
